questions.text: O NOT WRITE IN THIS AREA DO NOT WRITE IN THIS AREA Answer ALL TWENTY EIGHT questions. Write your answers in the spaces provided. *P81643A0528* Turn over 5   DO DO NOT WRITE IN THIS AREA DO NOT WRITE IN THIS AREA DO NOT WRITE IN THIS AREA 5 All students at a school are asked which sport they prefer from football, tennis, rugby and cricket. The table gives information about the probabilities that, when a student is chosen at random, the student prefers football or tennis or rugby or cricket. Favourite sport football tennis rugby cricket Probability 2x 0.2 x 0.35 One of the students at the school is chosen at random. (a) Work out the probability that this student prefers tennis or cricket. .......................................................... (1) There are 700 students at the school. (b) Work out how many students prefer football. .......................................................... (4) (Total for Question 5 is 5 marks)
